title: MIT license + visibility
goal: mini-orchestrator ships under the MIT license: a root LICENSE file (auto-detected and shown by GitHub), the "license": "MIT" field in package.json (shown on npmjs.com), and a matching note in the README replacing the current placeholder.

steps.title: Add root LICENSE file (MIT)
steps.detail: Standard MIT license text at the repo root with copyright "2026 Stanislav Kremeň"; GitHub auto-detects it and shows "MIT" in the repo sidebar.

steps.title: Set "license": "MIT" in package.json
steps.detail: Add the license field so npmjs.com shows MIT on the package page; verifiable via npm pkg get license.

steps.title: Update README license section
steps.detail: Replace the "## License / attribution" placeholder ("Your own.") with a short MIT note linking to ./LICENSE.

steps.title: Verify license visibility, build and tests
steps.detail: npm pack --dry-run lists LICENSE in the tarball (npm includes it regardless of the files whitelist); npm run build and npm test stay green.
